# Sugarcoat Salon in Hennur | Hair, Beauty, Makeup & Nail Services Bangalore

Premium hair, makeup, nail & beauty services at Sugarcoat Salon in Hennur, Bangalore. From hair treatments to luxe facials, relax, refresh, and reinvent your style.

## Key Facts
- Location: 1st Floor, Capital Market, Hennur Main Road, near Kanakashree Housing Society, Kannuru, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560077
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91-8296545458
- Hours: 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM, all 7 days
- Rating: 4.9★ (72 Google Reviews)
- Areas served: Hennur, Kannuru, Thanisandra, Kothanur, Bagalur, Byrathi, Nagawara, Bangalore
- Type: Unisex salon — hair, skin, nails, bridal & party makeup

## Services Offered
- [Services & Pricing](https://sugarcoatsalon.in/services): Full price list — hair, skin, nails, makeup.
- [Haircut & Styling](https://sugarcoatsalon.in/services/haircut-and-styling-hennur-road-bangalore): Men's, women's, kids' haircuts and blow-dry styling.
- [Hair Colouring](https://sugarcoatsalon.in/services/hair-colouring-hennur-road-bangalore): Global colour, highlights, balayage, root touch-up.
- [Hair Botox Treatment](https://sugarcoatsalon.in/services/hair-botox-treatment-hennur-road-bangalore): Deep-conditioning repair treatment for frizzy, damaged hair.
- [Keratin Treatment](https://sugarcoatsalon.in/services/keratin-treatment-hennur-road-bangalore): Smoothening and straightening treatment for frizz-free hair.
- [Bridal & Party Makeup](https://sugarcoatsalon.in/services/bridal-makeup-party-makeup-hennur-road-bangalore): HD bridal makeup, engagement, reception, and party makeup.
- [Nail Extensions & Gel Polish](https://sugarcoatsalon.in/services/nail-extensions-gel-nail-polish-hennur-road-bangalore): Acrylic/gel extensions, gel polish, nail art.
- [Facial & Skin Care](https://sugarcoatsalon.in/services/facial-skin-care-hennur-road-bangalore): Hydrating, brightening, anti-acne, and anti-ageing facials.

- [Keratin vs Hair Botox: Which Treatment Is Right?](https://sugarcoatsalon.in/blogs/keratin-vs-hair-botox): Comparison guide to choose the right hair treatment.
